text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: emaste

Log:
  addr2line: fflush output after each address lookup

  Certain tools spawn addr2line and pass addresses one at a time for
  resolution.

  Reported by:	antoine
  Sponsored by:	The FreeBSD Foundation
